title: Storage Adapter Integration & Validation
purpose: Validate the storage adapter integration across all runtime concerns and ensure backward compatibility during transition.
architectural_constraints: All existing tests pass with adapter
Rollback to direct filesystem possible via configuration
acceptance_criteria: All governance scripts execute correctly via adapter
Performance benchmark within 10% of direct filesystem
No direct fs mutations remain in runtime scripts

traceability.description: Storage adapter integration validated: 34/34 tests pass, -5.4% benchmark overhead, rollback documented, ensureDir optimization applied
